---
title: 'Research for Practice: Web Security and Mobile Web Computing'
author:
- Jean Yang
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
- Yuhao Zhu
- Peter Bailis
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/rfp16.pdf
journ: ACM Queue
year: 2016
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
award: Invited Article to the "Research for Practice" ( RfP ) Column
pub_number: 12
---
